name: Lemon Bars
recipeIngredient: whole eggs (such as Simply Eggs substitute)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine wafer crumbs and butter. Set aside 1/4 cup crumbs for topping.
2. Pat remaining crumbs into an 8-inch square pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 4-5 minutes, just until lightly browned. Cool.
4. Beat liquid whole eggs until thick and light in color. Gradually beat in sugar until very thick and light.
5. Stir in lemon zest, juice, salt, and flour.
6. Pour the batter over the baked crust.
7. Sprinkle remaining crumbs over the top.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes or until the center is set. Let cool to room temperature.
9. Cut into bars or desired shapes.
Makes 18 bars.
